zh.lifeSummary: 當Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja於1430年7月28日出生在瑞典索德曼藍德費亞爾斯亞福特時，她的父親Germund Laurensson30歲，母親Ingeborg Larsdotter20歲。她和Ragvald Mattsson Kagg至少有1個兒子。她去世於1484年7月28日在瑞典索德曼藍德斯比-雷卡內洛斯維可享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja于1430年7月28日出生在瑞典索德曼藍德費亞爾斯亞福特时，她的父亲Germund Laurensson30岁，母亲Ingeborg Larsdotter20岁。她和Ragvald Mattsson Kagg至少有1个儿子。她去世于1484年7月28日在瑞典索德曼藍德斯比-雷卡內洛斯維可享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Birgitta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Birgit
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

historicEvents.title: The Engelbrekt Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Engelbrekt Engelbrektsson, a Swedish mine owner and statesman, led a rebellion against Eric of Pomerania, King of the Kalmar Union. Sweden was upset with the Danes' interference with Swedish exports and unjust collection of taxes. The Engelbrekt Rebellion led to the deposing of Eric of Pomerania and the eventual dissolution of the Kalmar Union.

en.lifeSummary: When Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja was born on 28 July 1430, in Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Sweden, her father, Germund Laurensson, was 30 and her mother, Ingeborg Larsdotter, was 20. She had at least 1 son with Ragvald Mattsson Kagg. She died on 28 July 1484, in Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Sweden, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja est née le 28 juillet 1430, à Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suède, son père, Germund Laurensson, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ingeborg Larsdotter, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ragvald Mattsson Kagg. Elle est décédée le 28 juillet 1484, à Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suède, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja am 28. Juli 1430 in Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Germund Laurensson 30 und ihre Mutter Ingeborg Larsdotter 20. Sie hatte mit Ragvald Mattsson Kagg mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 28. Juli 1484 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja è nata il il 28 luglio 1430 nel Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Svezia, sua padre, Germund Laurensson, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ingeborg Larsdotter, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ragvald Mattsson Kagg. Morì il 28 luglio 1484, nel Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Svezia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Birgitta Germundsdotter Liljaが1430年7月28日にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドフジaルスクaフトで生まれた時，父Germund Laurenssonは30歳，母Ingeborg Larsdotterは20歳であった。彼女はRagvald Mattsson Kaggとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1484年7月28日にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドハスブイ-レカルンロスヴィクで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja(이)가 1430년 7월 28일 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 프ja스ka프트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Germund Laurensson(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ingeborg Larsdotter(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Ragvald Mattsson Kagg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 7월 28일 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 후스비-레카른 로스빅에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.28 July 1430–28 July 1484: 28 de julho de 1430–28 de julho de 1484
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja nasceu em 28 de julho de 1430, em Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suécia, seu pai, Germund Laurensson, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ingeborg Larsdotter, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ragvald Mattsson Kagg. Ela faleceu em 28 de julho de 1484, em Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suécia, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja родилась 28 июля 1430 г. в местности фджaллскaфт, сoдирманланд, Швеция, её отцу по имени Germund Laurensson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingeborg Larsdotter, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ragvald Mattsson Kagg. Она умерла 28 июля 1484 г. в местности россвик, хусби-рекарн, сoдирманланд, Швеция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.28 July 1430–28 July 1484: 28 de julio de 1430–28 de julio de 1484
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja nació el 28 de julio de 1430, en Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suecia, su papá, Germund Laurensson, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ingeborg Larsdotter, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ragvald Mattsson Kagg. Murió el 28 de julio de 1484, en Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suecia, a la edad de 54 años.
